name: the Reefkin

saveActions.text: Rebuild a living reef-pool from brine and pearl — a garden for a people who ARE the garden.
Stand watches over the elder-groves through the raid season.
Bear a petrified elder to the high grove, the way the currents once would have.

exploitActions.text: The elder-groves are standing lodes of pearl and reef-iron. They are also their grandparents.
They can't fight. You can. Name your price.
Claim the reef's salvage lanes on paper and let hunger do the quiet work.

ledger.note: engineered decline — the priests are not fooled

reactions.saved: Reefkin hands at the Ark; Reefkin song in every epilogue that has singing.
reactions.extinguished: Silent groves. Vengeance callings from the scattered young. Halor dims toward you; Ur-Noth warms.
reactions.grimWorksInSight: Will not trade within sight of the Salt-Wheel. They know what grinding is.

lore: They grew with the living reef and are petrifying as it dies — gentle, slow, their elders already statues in the groves. Their bodies are the resource. That is the razor the world hands you.
